channel.title: flux7.art - log_
channel.description: Essays on AI agent governance, event streaming, and MCP tooling by Marc Verchiani.

item.title: Governing Claude agents with 10 lines of YAML
item.description: The Anthropic Agent SDK builds agents. flux7-mesh governs them. MeshHooks connects the two in 3 lines of code. Full walkthrough, from install to governed tool calls.

item.title: Go for AI agents: a field report
item.description: Five Go projects for agent infrastructure. One external dependency across four of them. What worked, what didn't, and why I keep choosing Go over Python for this layer.

item.title: Schema governance without vendor lock-in
item.description: Schema registries store schemas. They don't govern them. event7 adds a provider-agnostic governance layer above Confluent, Apicurio, Karapace, and Redpanda, with a Docker-first deployment that works out of the box.

item.title: Middleware vs Sidecar: two ways to govern AI agents
item.description: Comparing Microsoft's Agent Governance Toolkit and flux7-mesh, two open-source architectures for the same problem, mapped against the OWASP Agentic Top 10.
